promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next archived-state intake batch after the upgrade-planning reduction and as the final folder-order batch from the archived runtime-state root.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the bundle topology, strict inventory-only evidence boundary, duplicated state copies, dated export-pack subtree, packaging residue, and zip-heavy transport history drift.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The upgrade-plan reduction was used for the indexed upgrade family, the export-pack reduction was used for duplicated carry materials, and the system-spec reduction was used for save-versus-transport boundary alignment.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because this zip-index batch preserves upgrade docs only as membership evidence while the upgrade family itself deserves a dedicated reduction.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived zip-index parent batch plus the archived upgrade-plan, export-pack, and system-spec A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable topology, inventory-boundary, duplication, residue, and transport-drift packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_ZIP_INDEX_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent as archived package inventory rather than payload authority or execution evidence.

candidate_items.name: BUNDLE_TOPOLOGY_CROSS_CLASS_COLOCATION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's strongest reusable signal: one archived bundle co-locates multiple source classes without reopening them.

candidate_items.name: INVENTORY_MEMBERSHIP_WITHOUT_PAYLOAD_REREAD_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest operating boundary in the parent batch: listed membership is not the same as reread, validation, or authority.

candidate_items.name: DUPLICATED_STATE_AND_EXPORT_PACK_STALE_STATE_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves repeated A2 copies and export-pack duplication as stale-state packaging evidence rather than state settlement.

candidate_items.name: MIRROR_AND_SIDECAR_RESIDUE_PRESERVATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves packaging residue as assembly history rather than deleting it from the archive-side picture.

candidate_items.name: ZIP_TRANSPORT_HISTORY_VS_ACTIVE_NONMUTATION_BOUNDARY_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest drift packet between the old zip-heavy bundle composition and tighter later non-mutation boundaries.

quarantined_items.name: INDEXED_PAYLOAD_INCLUSION_AS_CORRECTNESS_OR_CURRENT_STATUS_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Bundle membership alone does not prove correctness, authority, or current status for the indexed payloads.

quarantined_items.name: LISTED_UPGRADE_DOCS_AS_IF_THIS_LANE_PROCESSED_THEM
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The zip index preserves upgrade-doc membership only and does not convert this lane into an upgrade-doc reread pass.

quarantined_items.name: THREAD_SAVE_AND_EXPORT_ZIPS_AS_CURRENT_TRANSPORT_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch preserves save and export zips as archived transport history, not as current doctrine.

quarantined_items.name: HAND_ASSEMBLED_BUNDLE_TOPOLOGY_AS_CURRENT_REQUIRED_PACKAGE_SCHEMA
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: One old hand-assembled bundle shape should not self-authorize into a current required package schema.

quarantined_items.name: DUPLICATED_A2_COPIES_AS_SINGLE_CURRENT_STATE_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Duplicated copies and dated export-pack repeats are stale-state markers, not proof of one settled current state.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable signals: bundle topology, inventory-only use boundaries, duplicated-state markers, packaging residue, and transport-boundary drift.
They preserve the zip index as archived package history without letting file inclusion, zip members, or repeated copies self-authorize current law.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain authority overreads, processed-here overreads, current-schema overreads, or state-settlement overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used archived upgrade-plan, export-pack, and system-spec A2-mid batches as neighboring boundary anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived zip-index reduction pass.
